choice_rule: Closed families and prior NEXT are context, not allowlists. Reopen only with a named new evidence class or repaired capability. A blocked observed-option route blocks only dependent claims and cannot alone justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another historical/capability route remains informative. Honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid after open routes are assessed for material novelty.

recent_runs.next: On the next distinct New York RTH market date, append one all-expiration TSLL observation snapshot and verify archive density advances from 1/3 to 2/3 without duplicate identical rows; no provider-backed historical simulation, observed-cost calibration, or L1 claim before 3/3.

On the next distinct New York RTH market date, append one all-expiration TSLL option observation snapshot and verify archive density advances from 1/3 to 2/3 without duplicating identical rows; do not run provider-backed historical simulation, observed-cost calibration, evolve-on-observed-grid, or L1 claims before 3/3.

Build a no-lookahead dividend/ex-date and early-assignment risk boundary for short-call diagonal and debit simulators, with deterministic behavioral and negative-control tests before strategy retuning; fail closed when required event data is absent, keep proxy claims L0, and do not reopen the rejected multi-horizon trend-pullback PCS family through threshold polish.

Inventory no-paid historical corporate-action sources that supply both ex-date and honest announcement-time known_at; implement an archived DividendEventProvider only with non-fabricated provenance, otherwise write a fail-closed data decision packet and keep required-mode diagonal/bull-call simulations blocked.

observed_historical_option_replay.blocked_reason: no broad historical observed option surfaces with complete entry/exit joins
observed_historical_option_replay.claim_limit: three dates validate capture/join plumbing or begin cost calibration; they do not establish strategy edge or L1

research_routes.rule: A blocked observed-option route blocks only observed-option claims. Archive density alone cannot justify DIMINISHING_RETURNS while another independent route remains informative; honest information-exhaustion stops remain valid.
